scripts.dev: npm run dev:clean && npm run dev:start
scripts.dev:clean: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$ports=@(3000,3001); Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $ports -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { taskkill /PID $_ /F | Out-Null }; if (Test-Path .next\dev\lock) { Remove-Item .next\dev\lock -Force }; if (Test-Path .next\dev) { Remove-Item .next\dev -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }"
